Short Email Form

?

Frequently asked questions

Dev Code Here

Dev Code Here

→ Who is this for?

Local businesses, service pros, and personal brands who want consistent visibility, leads, and growth, without managing freelancers or wasting time on DIY marketing.

 
→ What other services do you provide?

We’re a full-service marketing agency. 

  • Social media management & daily content

  • Videography & photography (drone, podcast, full production)

  • SEO & Google Business optimization

  • Paid ads (Google & Meta)

  • Graphic design & branding (logos, carousels, print & digital)

  • Email & SMS marketing

  • Automations (Zapier, CRMs, booking forms, notifications)

  • eCommerce & event booking websites

  • Membership platforms & advanced tools

You can bundle these into a full growth package, or start with just one service at a time.

→ How often do I need to be involved?

We handle the daily execution (web design, content, automations) while you focus on running your business.
You’ll just approve big-picture items and show up for scheduled shoots if needed. 150% Hassle Free

→ What can you film?

We handle full video production, including drone footage, podcasts, script writing, and editing. We film for business owners across Florida, creating high-quality content that drives attention and builds trust.

→ Can you build eCommerce or event booking websites?

Yes. We design and develop full-scale eCommerce stores, event booking sites, membership platforms, and more.

Dev Code Here

Dev Code Here

→ Do you run ads and SEO?

Yes. We manage Google Ads, Meta Ads, and local SEO to bring you targeted traffic that turns into clients.

 
→ What if I need changes after launch?

  • First 2 weeks: Free fixes

  • Ongoing: $175/month for unlimited updates

→ Do you offer referral rewards?

Yes, we reward referrals with direct payouts based on purchase type:

  • Receive $150 for any referral who signs a package over $750
  • Receive $250 for website projects valued over $1,750

Just share localsocialmarketingllc.com/share or hand them one of our printed referral cards.

If you received one, keep it close. It’s your direct pass to earn cash for every successful connection.

→ Are there any refunds?

Due to the high quality nature of the work, there will be no refunds issued past the first week of service. However, no refunds will be issued for completed work.

  • Local Social Marketing helps Palm Beach businesses grow with web design, videography, and digital marketing.
